name: MultiplyNTTs
label: Algorithm 11

inputs.name: f_hat
inputs.description: 256-element array modulo q representing first NTT input

inputs.name: g_hat
inputs.description: 256-element array modulo q representing second NTT input

outputs.name: h_hat
outputs.description: 256-element array modulo q representing product of the two NTT inputs in T_q

body_raw: (h_hat[2*i], h_hat[2*i + 1]) <- BaseCaseMultiply(f_hat[2*i], f_hat[2*i + 1], g_hat[2*i], g_hat[2*i + 1], zeta^(2*BitRev7(i)+1))
